purpose: Predict late/overdue payment risk (P30/P60/P90) for companies.
model_type: LightGBMClassifier (tabular) + feature engineer; DL benchmark exists (GRU).
fallback: Has baseline fallback logic in pipeline; DL is benchmark-only.

data.notes: Uses tax_payments history; label logic exists; still needs adjudicated ground-truth for edge cases.

model_quality.notes: Strong tabular baseline + calibration hooks; DL benchmark provides upgrade path.

monitoring.notes: Quality/drift tables available; needs automated alert thresholds by horizon.

governance.notes: ModelRegistry + training runs supported; rollout gating can be strengthened.

purpose: Score VAT refund cases for fraud/abuse risk.
fallback: Table-driven serving; fallback not explicitly exposed but can be added.

data.notes: Depends on case outcome labeling quality; needs stronger adverse-outcome ground-truth.

model_quality.notes: Solid classical baseline; could benefit from calibrated GBM and richer fraud signals.

monitoring.notes: Slices/calibration possible but not consistently enforced.

governance.notes: Registry exists; needs champion/challenger + rollback gates.

key_gaps: Cost-sensitive thresholds tied to audit capacity

purpose: Score invoices for suspicious behavior (duplication, abnormal patterns).
fallback: Has heuristic fallback when learned artifact missing.

data.notes: Pseudo-label heavy; needs investigation outcomes / confirmed fraud labels.

model_quality.notes: Good baseline; missing sequence/graph context in main model.

monitoring.notes: Needs consistent calibration and slice monitoring (sector/size).

governance.notes: Inference audit exists; rollout gates can be formalized.

key_gaps: Graph-aware invoice ring detection model (GNN) in production path

purpose: Detect mispricing/outlier behavior in related-party trade pricing.

data.notes: Needs richer comparables, customs data, and adjudicated TP adjustments.

model_quality.notes: Strong baseline; could add quantile regression and monotonic constraints.

monitoring.notes: Needs slice monitoring by HS code / partner country / industry.

purpose: Audit selection, next-best-action, and expected collection uplift.
fallback: Yes (hybrid formulas if learned artifacts missing).

data.notes: Needs causal/experimental design for uplift (policy changes, selection bias).

model_quality.notes: Good start; can move to CATE/uplift trees + off-policy evaluation.

serving.notes: Batch materialization stable; online feature service could improve freshness.

monitoring.notes: Rollout tracking and eval tables present; add automated gate enforcement.

governance.notes: Strong lineage + rollout metadata; phase60 lineage fixed.

key_gaps: Streaming updates for rapid risk shifts

purpose: Ownership/UBO risk inference including offshore/proxy/phoenix patterns.

data.notes: Evidence provenance modeled; still needs validated labels and ongoing OSINT ingestion.

model_quality.notes: GNN harness exists; needs operational serving + backtesting against investigations.

serving.notes: Graph APIs exist; deep model serving not yet a standard prod path.

purpose: 1/5/10y macro simulation with probabilistic/regime-aware residuals + narrative generation.
model_type: Hybrid baseline + residual ML + constraint engine + local narrative expansion.

data.notes: External signals modeled; still limited by historical horizon length/noise.

monitoring.notes: Needs forecast calibration monitoring by horizon in standard dashboard.

governance.notes: Run registry + constraints audit logs exist.

purpose: Offline/internal tax assistant: legal consulting, multi-agent planning, GraphRAG retrieval, policy gating, trace ledger.
model_type: Enhanced intent + Legal GraphRAG/pgvector/BM25/cross-encoder + local TaxAgentLLM tier + verified template fallback + policy thresholds.
fallback: Local LLM is optional; verified template synthesis remains as auditable fallback.

data.notes: KB versioning, KG extraction runs and citation metadata exist; still needs larger adjudicated legal QA labels.

model_quality.notes: Planner DAG, ReAct retries, debate persistence, GraphRAG metadata and claim verifier are integrated; needs calibrated legal QA gates.

serving.notes: Streaming endpoint, with-file routing, hybrid retrieval, GraphRAG and audit persistence are available.

monitoring.notes: Trace logs, retrieval logs, workspace and claim verification tables exist; dashboards/gate automation remain.

governance.notes: Policy logs, debate adjudication, execution plans and claim verification exist; prompt/model registry can be tightened.

key_gaps: Adjudicated legal QA labels for amended/expired/official-letter conflicts
Automated gates for faithfulness, invalid-law rate, abstain correctness and p95 latency
Red-team and no-citation trap regression suite
